questions.question: How long do the two witnesses prophesy?
questions.feedback: The two witnesses will prophesy for 1,260 days clothed in sackcloth.

questions.question: What happens to the two witnesses after they finish their testimony?
questions.feedback: The beast from the abyss attacks and kills them.

questions.question: After three and a half days, God breathes life back into the two witnesses.
questions.feedback: After three and a half days the breath of life from God entered them and they stood up.

questions.question: The seventh trumpet announces: The kingdom of the world has become the kingdom of our Lord and of his _____.
questions.feedback: The kingdom of the world has become the kingdom of our Lord and of his Christ.

questions.question: The two witnesses are described as two olive trees and two _____.
questions.feedback: They are the two olive trees and the two lampstands before the Lord.
